description_long: This is a robust hand trolley constructed primarily from metal, featuring a tall, rectangular frame with vertical and horizontal support bars for added strength. The trolley is equipped with two large, solid wheels mounted at the rear, allowing for easy tilting and maneuverability over urban surfaces such as sidewalks and curbs. At the base, a wide, flat loading platform extends outward, designed to support and transport heavy or bulky items. The upper section of the frame curves backward, forming a single, continuous handlebar for comfortable gripping and control. The overall finish is a matte, industrial gray, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The design is utilitarian, optimized for durability and frequent use in environments like warehouses, garages, or delivery routes.
description: A sturdy, metal hand trolley with a tall frame, two large rear wheels, and a wide flat loading platform. It features a single curved handlebar and a matte gray finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular frame, wide loading platform, and both wheels partially visible behind the frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the loading platform, the curved handlebar, and the full profile of the two large wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the frame, both wheels fully visible, and the platform edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the platform and wheels from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: single bar handle, curved at the top, made of steel, ergonomic for gripping
attribute_wheel_arrangement: two parallel wheels at the rear base
